recommendations.title: Megaboa
recommendations.genres: Action, Horror, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: On a trip to Colombia, a group of college students encounter a fifty-foot boa constrictor, hungry for blood.

recommendations.title: Be Somebody
recommendations.overview: Pop superstar Jordan Jaye has a big dream he just wants to live like a regular teenager.  When he's chased down by some excited female fans, he finds a perfect hideout and a reluctant new friend from a small town, high-school art student, Emily Lowe.

recommendations.title: Pauline at the Beach
recommendations.overview: Marion is about to divorce from her husband and takes her 15-year-old niece, Pauline, on a vacation to Granville. There, she meets an old love...

recommendations.title: Five Times Two

recommendations.title: The Way We Were
recommendations.overview: Opposites attract when, during their college days, Katie Morosky, a politically active Jew, meets Hubbell Gardiner, a feckless WASP. Years later, in the wake of World War II, they meet once again and, despite their obvious differences, attempt to mak

recommendations.title: 2 Days in Paris
recommendations.overview: Marion and Jack try to rekindle their relationship with a visit to Paris, home of Marion's parents — and several of her ex-boyfriends.

recommendations.title: Ben X
recommendations.overview: Harassed by bullies because of his mild autism, teen Ben finds refuge in an online computer game, which leads him to his virtual dream girl, Scarlite. Together, the odd couple seeks revenge against Ben's tormentors.

recommendations.title: The Nature of Love
recommendations.overview: Sophia is a philosophy professor in Montreal and has lived as a couple with Xavier for 10 years. Sylvain is a carpenter in the Laurentians and must renovate their country house. When Sophia meets Sylvain for the first time, it’s love at first sight.

recommendations.title: Autumn Dreams

recommendations.title: Beau Pere
recommendations.overview: Rémi is a man trapped in a deteriorating marriage. When his wife is unexpectedly killed in a car accident, Rémi is left with his stepdaughter, Marion, who chooses to stay with him rather than live with her birth father. After the initial shock passes
